label: Cold Spot
clue: Localized temperature drop suggests spirit activity or threshold instability.

label: Sulfur Trace
clue: Sulfur, ash, or scorched air points toward infernal manifestation.

label: Unnatural Tracks
clue: Tracks show size, gait, direction, and whether the threat is physical or staged.

clue: Residue shows what was contained, summoned, or excluded.
